name: AI Engineering Harness
description: Multi-agent engineering organization harness. Issue → Worktree → Plan → Implement → Adversarial Review → Evidence → Merge → Memory loop. 18 agent personas, 9 workflows, evidence-gated, cold-start review, dynamic L0–L3 context control. Use prompts: bootstrap / resume / drive / audit.

install.specific-agent: npx -y skills add lora-sys/ai-engineering-harness -g -a claude-code codex grok
install.via-script: bash install.sh  # default installs the full family
